mapped_public_claims.statement_snippet: Hoax.ai is not a truth machine.
mapped_public_claims.prohibited_interpretation: truth verdict capability, fake/real detector, active classifier

mapped_public_claims.statement_snippet: Hoax.ai classifies evidence posture on evidence artifacts
mapped_public_claims.prohibited_interpretation: truth verdict, subject accusation, public classifier availability

mapped_public_claims.statement_snippet: Hoax.ai classifies the evidence artifact — the image, recording, document, screenshot, source record, or media object — never the person, institution, brand, organization, or event connected to it.
mapped_public_claims.prohibited_interpretation: subject accusation, guilt inference, institution bad faith

mapped_public_claims.statement_snippet: Hoax.ai is being developed as a GitHub-first sovereign digital asset.
mapped_public_claims.prohibited_interpretation: external deployment completion, live domain service, DNS readiness

mapped_public_claims.statement_snippet: It does not claim to detect all synthetic media.
mapped_public_claims.prohibited_interpretation: guaranteed detection, detects all synthetic media

mapped_public_claims.statement_snippet: Classify the evidence artifact. Do not perform the verdict.
